are_you_ok.title: Heat advisory issued as dangerous temperatures return to San Antonio; here’s how to stay safe
are_you_ok.summary: Dangerous heat advisory affecting broad San Antonio population now
are_you_ok.description:
Dangerous heat returns to San Antonio this week, with a heat advisory in effect Wednesday and heat index values reaching up to 112 degrees.
Heat advisory issued as dangerous temperatures return to San Antonio; here’s how to stay safe was first posted on July 22, 2026 at 6:30 am.

conversation_starters.title: SeaWorld San Antonio welcomes rescued belugas from former Canada marine park
conversation_starters.summary: SeaWorld SA welcomes rescued belugas from closed Canadian park — novel, widely-discussed local story. You could open with: 'Did you hear SeaWorld is taking in those rescued beluga whales?'
conversation_starters.description: The whales were part of a large pod of 30 belugas living at Marineland of Canada, a closed marine park that can no longer care for them.

conversation_starters.title: Spurs want your favorite local restaurant at Frost Bank Center
conversation_starters.summary: Spurs seeking local restaurants for Frost Bank Center residency — fun, work-safe local hook. You could open with: 'The Spurs are picking local restaurants for Frost Bank Center — any spot you'd nominate?'
conversation_starters.description: A dozen San Antonio restaurants will be selected to serve Spurs fans during the 2026-27 season through the popular Culinary Residency program.

you_should_know.title: Mayor Jones proposed ending Ready to Work to help address SA's budget gap. Council members who sit on its board are split
you_should_know.summary: Mayor proposing to end taxpayer-funded jobs-training program amid budget gap — local institutional context. Political, kept as context.
you_should_know.description: The mayor's suggestion comes at a time when the taxpayer-funded workplace training program is finding more success connecting San Antonio residents with jobs.
